response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled and experienced hands-on Staff Engineer with strong distributed systems expertise and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling. However, he lacks the executive leadership, team scaling experience (10 to 30+ engineers), and deep fintech credit-risk background strictly required for this CTO position.
strengths: Over 15 years of hands-on engineering experience, including building event-driven microservices handling millions of requests.
Recent practical exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, Model Context Protocol (MCP), and agentic workflows.
Strong foundation in software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD across diverse technology stacks.
concerns: Completely lacks executive-level engineering leadership and experience scaling teams from 10 to 30+ people.
No demonstrated experience managing algorithmic working-capital allocation or real-time credit risk systems.
Missing experience in organizational governance, managing outsourced delivery partners, and board-level communication.
